html:
Exclusive to:

For the Sand Castles created by the Antlion in Don't Starve Together, see Antlion.

Sand Castles are craftable Structures in the Shipwrecked DLC. They are found under the Structures Tab, require 4 Sand, 2 Palm Leaves, and 3 Seashells and are always available to craft.

A Sand Castle increases Sanity when standing nearby, however it only lasts a single Day, so it is best to place it when the player will be near it for a significant period of time. When the day is over and the Sand Castle decays, the sandcastle disappears leaving nothing behind. It cannot be set on fire or destroyed with a Hammer, however it can be dug with a Shovel returning the same resources.

Sand Castles can only be placed on barren land without any Turfs, but once they have been deployed it is possible to place any turfs underneath them.

Using more than one Sand Castle is not recommended, as the overall sanity output is decreased if standing in between 2 of them, so it is only advised to pair a single castle with another sanity restoring object/item

Bugs

  • The Sand Castle, despite being likely intended for placement only on sand, can also be placed upon a Snakeskin Rug.

Gallery

  • Wilson standing next to a Sand Castle.
  • Wilson standing next to a depleted Sand Castle while holding a Shovel.
  • Promo art for the Seas the Day update, lampshading how Sand Castles were once, illogically, repairable with Sewing Kits.
  • Willow standing next to a Sand Castle while holding a Machete and wearing a Backpack.
  • A Sand Castle that has turned into sand.
Craftable ItemsStructures

For the Sand Castles created by the Antlion in Don't Starve Together, see Antlion.
Sand Castle
"Therapeutic and relaxing."
Food Info
+25/min
Object Info
1 day
Crafting
×4 ×2 ×3
Tab
Tier
Always available
Miscellaneous
"sand_castle"
“It's a sandcastle, in the sand!”
–Wilson
“It's cute, I guess.”
–Willow
“Good for stomping!”
–Wolfgang
“I suppose this diversion brings some comfort.”
–Wendy
“IT'S A STRANGELY PLEASING STRUCTURE”
–WX-78
“I modeled it after a classic European castellum.”
–Wickerbottom
“Who knew sand could look so good.”
–Woodie
“I found that wholly unenjoyable. I swear.”
–Maxwell
“Fascinating, it seems to add protection against psychic attack.”
–Wagstaff
“I want to pretend I'm a giant and crush it!”
–Wigfrid
“Look what we built!”
–Webber
“I feel like a kid again!”
–Walani
“How calming.”
–Warly
“No pirate can make a better sandcastle than ol' Woodlegs!”
–Woodlegs
“LOOKETH OKAY TO MINE EYES”
–Wilba
“Made that”
–Wormwood
“Why have real adventures when I can play adventures in the sand?”
–Wheeler
Sand Castles are craftable Structures in the Shipwrecked DLC. They are found under the Structures Tab, require 4 Sand, 2 Palm Leaves, and 3 Seashells and are always available to craft.

When the day is over and the Sand Castle decays, the sandcastle disappears leaving nothing behind. It cannot be set on fire or destroyed with a Hammer, however it can be dug with a Shovel returning the same resources.
Sand Castles can only be placed on barren land without any Turfs, but once they have been deployed it is possible to place any turfs underneath them.
Using more than one Sand Castle is not recommended, as the overall sanity output is decreased if standing in between 2 of them, so it is only advised to pair a single castle with another sanity restoring object/item

The Sand Castle, despite being likely intended for placement only on sand, can also be placed upon a Snakeskin Rug.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Lâu đài Cát là Công trình có thể chế tạo được trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Chúng được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Cấu Trúc, yêu cầu 4 Cát, 2 Lá Cọ và 3 Vỏ Sò và luôn có sẵn để chế tạo.

'''Sand Castles''' are craftable [[Structure]]s in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. They are found under the [[Structures Tab]], require 4 [[Sand]], 2 [[Palm Leaf|Palm Leaves]], and 3 [[Seashell]]s and are always available to craft.

A Sand Castle increases [[Sanity]] when standing nearby, however it only lasts a single [[Day]], so it is best to place it when the player will be near it for a significant period of time. When the day is over and the Sand Castle decays, the sandcastle disappears leaving nothing behind. It cannot be set on fire or destroyed with a [[Hammer]], however it can be dug with a [[Shovel]] returning the same resources.

Sand Castles can only be placed on barren land without any [[Turfs]], but once they have been deployed it is possible to place any turfs underneath them.

Using more than one Sand Castle is not recommended, as the overall sanity output is decreased if standing in between 2 of them, so it is only advised to pair a single castle with another sanity restoring object/item

=={{Pic|32|Mosquito}} Bugs==
* The Sand Castle, despite being likely intended for placement only on sand, can also be placed upon a [[Snakeskin Rug]].
